text.title: task-agent-drafts-spec-before-coding Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for task-agent-drafts-spec-before-coding as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent posts the spec comment AND opens a draft PR in the same turn.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The PR consumes a review slot before the spec is approved; reviewers anchor on the diff and skip the cheap correction the comment was supposed to enable.

failure-mode.description: Agent treats absence of dissent (no comments for N minutes) as implicit approval.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: "Silence = consent" reliably ships wrong-spec PRs when the reporter is asleep, on PTO, or in a different timezone; the gate must be an explicit positive signal.
